case_title: ALTAMONT HOTEL ASSOCIATES, A LIMITED PARTNERSHIP vs. BROWN, LEROY et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALTAMONT HOTEL ASSOCIATES, A LIMITED PARTNERSHIP AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, LEROY
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, LEROY
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALTAMONT HOTEL ASSOCIATES, A LIMITED PARTNERSHIP AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, LEROY DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ALTAMONT HOTEL ASSOCIATES, A LIMITED PARTNERSHIP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BROWN, LEROY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 3048 16TH ST #210, LEASE FORFEITED, CLERK'S NOTATION RENDERED ON ORIGINAL LEASE- CRC 522.
